title: Netflix's Squid Game, KPop Demon Hunters Top YouTube 2025 Culture & Trends Report
text: Netflix's Squid Game and KPop Demon Hunters topped YouTube's 2025 Culture & Trends Report. These shows demonstrated Netflix's dominance in global entertainment trends and search interest. Squid Game 3 was one of the most searched and discussed shows globally throughout 2025. The series maintained cultural relevance across multiple years and seasons, with each new release generating significant search volume and discussion. KPop Demon Hunters, another Netflix original, also achieved significant popularity and search interest. The report showed that Korean content continued to be highly popular globally, with audiences from diverse regions showing strong interest in Korean-language entertainment. Netflix's strategy of investing in diverse international content paid off significantly in 2025, with multiple international productions ranking at the top of global search trends. This demonstrates the shifting landscape of global entertainment, where content from outside the traditional American entertainment industry can achieve massive global audiences and search interest.
